title: stevia santacruzensis
intro: Stevia santacruzensis, also known as the sweetleaf or stevia, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Paraguay and Brazil. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and lower blood pressure due to its high content of stevioside and rebaudioside. The health benefits of stevia include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve oral health, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. Stevia santacruzensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and extracts for consumption, and is also used as a sweetener in various food products.
